yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Browser_Security_ZeroDays_Are_Only_Part_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-11"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-59206: n8n is an open source workflow automation pl"; content:"CVE-2026-59206"; nocase; sid:5096870; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 44 threat advisories. Of these, 0 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 12 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
